questions.question_text_full: What was the significance of Bose’s slogan ‘Jai Hind’?

options.text: It symbolised the struggle against British colonialism.
It was a call to arms for the Indian and British Army.
It manifests the vision of selected communities.
It represented Bose’s vision of a capitalist India.

questions.correct_option_text: It symbolised the struggle against British colonialism.
